hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; if echo "$f" | grep -qE '(^|/)\.env$'; then printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Do not edit .env directly. Use .env.example instead."}}'; fi; }
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; [ -n "$f" ] && ruff format --quiet "$f"; } 2>/dev/null || true
